description: The Carpino are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta operating in the municipalities of Petronà, Cerva, Sersale and the Levante area. They are also active in Liguria, in the province of Genoa, in the municipalities of Chiavari and Lavagna. The group has been involved in a feud in Petronà since the 1990s, with numerous attacks and murders. In 2014, assets worth 2 million euros were seized from an alleged affiliate.
